subcodes.first_line: O loving servant! Today the most praiseworthy station is steadfastness and firmness in the Covenant of the adored Lord, for the Ark [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عبد ودود مقام محمود الیوم ثبوت و رسوخ بر میثاق رب معبود است چه که سفینه
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
